exam_name: NNA Certified Notary Signing Agent Exam

testing_centers.notes: NNA national exams (CNSA, LSA) are taken online via NNA's proctored platform. State exams vary: California uses PSI, New York uses state exam sites, Colorado uses the SOS online portal.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required for all exams. For state commissions, applicants must be legal residents of the state.
exam_rules: NNA national exams are online proctored. State exams are administered by state-contracted vendors or state portals. Texas and Florida do not require a written exam; applicants must complete other commission requirements (background check or education course). All notary applicants must meet state-specific age and residency requirements.
renewal_options: Most state notary commissions are valid for 4 years and require re-application and re-examination at renewal. NNA national certifications (CNSA, LSA) are valid for 4 years and require renewal through NNA.

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies vary by state and exam provider. NNA national exams typically allow retakes with a short waiting period. State exams: CA and NY allow multiple attempts; check state SOS for waiting period details.

official_study_resources.title: NNA Notary Signing Agent Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Official NNA study materials available at nationalnotary.org

aliases: nna certified notary signing agent exam
